title: juncus × langii
intro: Juncus × langii, also known as Lang's rush, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the genus Juncus, commonly found in wetland areas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Lang's rush include its ability to treat various ailments such as respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Lang's rush are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or oil, which can be used as a tea, tincture, or salve.
